nasb.text: The priest answered David and said, “There is no ordinary bread on hand, but there is consecrated bread; if only the young men have kept themselves from women.”

esv.text: And the priest answered David, “I have no common bread on hand, but there is holy bread—if the young men have kept themselves from women.”

cnv.text: 祭司回答大衛：“我手中沒有普通的餅，只有聖餅。只有那些沒有親近過女人的年輕人，才可以吃的。”

ccb.text: 祭司答道：“我们没有普通的饼，只有圣饼，如果你的部下没有亲近过女色，就可以吃。”
